backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.general_idea: Reordered import statements to group third-party imports before project-specific imports.
backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.human_impl: Moved `import com.recruitmentapp.filters.JwtRequestFilter;` from the bottom of the import block to the top.

backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.general_idea: Added a security rule to restrict the search API endpoint to users with the EMPLOYER authority.
backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.human_impl: Added `.requestMatchers("/api/search").hasAuthority("EMPLOYER")` to the security filter chain.

backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.general_idea: Added a security rule to allow public access to all file-related API endpoints.
backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.human_impl: Added `.requestMatchers("/api/files/**").permitAll()` to the security filter chain.

backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.general_idea: Added a security rule to restrict the search API endpoint to users with the USER authority.
backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.human_impl: Added `.requestMatchers("/api/search").hasAuthority("USER")` to the security filter chain.

backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.general_idea: Updated the hardcoded file path for the external Python AI model script to match the new local directory structure.
Reorganize import statements to group custom application imports at the top, separating them from framework imports.
backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.human_impl: Moved custom imports (com.recruitmentapp.*) above framework imports (jakarta.*, org.springframework.*).

backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.general_idea: Moved custom application imports to the top of the file, preceding third-party framework imports.
backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.human_impl: Moved `import com.recruitmentapp.*` statements above `import org.springframework.*` statements.

backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.general_idea: Replace verbose manual getter and setter methods with the Lombok @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate code.
backend/src/main/java/com/recruitmentapp.human_impl: Added 'import lombok.Data;' and '@Data' annotation, removed manual getEmail, setEmail, getPassword, and setPassword methods.
